problem id: 872ca2f9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01100001 -> 00011100
  11011001 -> 01010111
  01111010 -> 01110010
  11101001 -> 01001001
  10100000 -> 01000100
  10100110 -> 10000111
  01110000 -> 00110110
  01000100 -> 10101010
  10001010 -> 00010100
  11000011 -> 00011001

query: 11000100
predicted answer: 11111010
